{{Quote|An intelligent and peaceful man, he has always been, and hard to believe, it is, that he would endanger the Sephi without cause.|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|<ref name="JediYoda" />}}
'''Alaric''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] and the [[King/Legends|king]] of [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a friend of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] for some 200 [[Standard year/Legends|years]], despite their friendship being somewhat strained by the demanding nature of their positions. When the war between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] erupted, Alaric chose to leave the Republic, seeing corruption in the government and believed that joining with the Separatist Alliance would restore order.

When the Republic [[Battle of Thustra|sent a force]] to Thustra, Alaric's friend, Grand Master Yoda, wanted to negotiate with the monarch for a peaceful solution. In the ensuing talks, Alaric tried to convince Yoda to join him on his side, since he stated that he was on the wrong side of the war. However, Alaric's nephew [[Navi]] manipulated both the Republic and the Jedi, resulting in a battle. Alaric forced his old friend to kill him in self-defense. The death of the king caused the neighboring worlds to send their armies to Thustra, so that the Republic had to retire.

==Biography==
[[File:AlaricDeath.jpg|thumb|left|100px|The death of King Alaric]]
King Alaric grew disgusted by [[Navi|his nephew's]] behavior in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] and the corruption in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He thus contacted [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and offered to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Alaric was not disloyal to the Republic and intended to rejoin when the corruption was gone.<ref name="JediYoda" />

Yoda arrived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with [[Clone trooper/Legends|troops]] and, together with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]], tried to persuade Alaric to leave the CIS. The King placed them under house arrest, believing that the Republic would try to take the world back by force. Eventually, King Alaric was forced into a confrontation with Yoda during the [[Battle of Thustra]] by the machinations of his nephew. The monarch forced Yoda to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] in order to incite the Sephi to fight against the Republic.<ref name="JediYoda" />
